evals.description: WordPress widget at low scale — WP-native stack selected

input.purpose: Customer support FAQ bot for a plumbing company website

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
platform_recommendation object is present with platform, rationale, and alternative fields
platform_recommendation.platform is 'wordpress-widget'
tech_stack object is present with runtime, framework, ai_provider, ai_model, database, session_store, and hosting fields
tech_stack.ai_model is a specific Claude model ID (e.g., 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' or 'claude-sonnet-4-6')
tech_stack.session_store mentions WordPress transients or options table (WP-appropriate for low scale)
api_design object is present with endpoint, method, authentication, rate_limiting, and streaming fields
api_design.endpoint includes '/wp-json/' path pattern
api_design.authentication mentions WordPress nonce
state_management object is present with session_store, session_ttl_hours, context_turns_kept, and summarization_strategy fields
integration_map is an array — contains an entry for Calendly (was in existing_integrations)
integration_map entries have system, direction, protocol, data_exchanged, and latency_budget_ms fields
data_flow is a non-empty string describing numbered message lifecycle steps
environment_variables_needed is an array — includes ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
risks is a non-empty array — each risk has risk, severity, and mitigation fields
Output does not invent integrations not mentioned in existing_integrations

evals.description: Slack bot at medium scale — Node.js stack with Redis

input.purpose: Internal team assistant for answering HR policy questions

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
platform_recommendation.platform is 'slack'
tech_stack.runtime contains 'Node.js' or 'node'
tech_stack.session_store mentions Redis (appropriate for medium scale)
api_design.endpoint includes '/slack/events'
api_design.authentication mentions HMAC signature verification
rate_limiting reflects medium scale limits
integration_map is an empty array or contains only the AI provider (no extra integrations invented)
risks array includes at least one entry about prompt injection or PII exposure

evals.description: High scale custom API — auto-scaling and Redis Cluster
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
platform_recommendation.platform is 'custom-api'
tech_stack.session_store mentions Redis Cluster or equivalent high-scale session store
tech_stack.hosting mentions auto-scaling or horizontal scaling approach
api_design.rate_limiting reflects high scale limits (token bucket or 100+ req/min per user)
integration_map has entries for both HubSpot and Segment
risks array includes cost overrun risk (unbounded conversation length at high scale)
